# Wall Texture

**Summary**: The physical characteristics of the foraminiferal shell surface.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2018-perdana|Perdana, 2018]] analyzed wall-texture to interpret physical and paleoenvironmental conditions.

## Scientific Context

- [[2018-perdana|Perdana, 2018]] Used to distinguish between high-energy and low-energy environments.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2018-perdana|Perdana, 2018]] Classification into Rough, Thuramminid, and Smooth categories.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Rough wall surfaces are concentrated in the muddy part of the lower shoreface environment. ([[2018-perdana|Perdana, 2018, p. 68]])
